query:
-- Solahart Brisbane: "ST-NBN Setup (remote support)" is a one-off setup fee - mark as one-off, no service match needed
UPDATE billing_items 
SET matchStatus = 'matched', matchConfidence = 'high', category = 'one-off',
    serviceExternalId = (SELECT externalId FROM services WHERE customerExternalId = 'C0220' AND serviceType = 'Internet' LIMIT 1)
WHERE billingPlatform = 'DataGate' AND customerExternalId = 'C0220' AND description LIKE '%Setup%';

-- Spicers Hiddenvale (C0224) - check what voice services exist
SELECT s.externalId, s.serviceType, s.planName FROM services s WHERE s.customerExternalId = 'C0224' AND s.status = 'active';
